responses.Extraction priority: Start with most duplicated (API error handling, then date formatting, then validators)
responses.Export style: Named exports (easier to tree-shake and more explicit)
responses.Documentation format: UTILITIES.md with JSDoc inline + separate usage guide
responses.Search strategy: Use grep/ripgrep to find all instances before refactoring
responses.Migration approach: Extract utility first, write tests, then replace all usages
responses.Backwards compatibility: Maintain exact behavior, don't change external APIs
